inputs.label: Current Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the individual, used for retirement planning context.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the individual, used for retirement planning context.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bireyin yaşı, emeklilik planlaması bağlamında kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Alter der Person, für den Kontext der Ruhestandsplanung

inputs.label: Current Portfolio
inputs.businessContext: Total current invested assets, the starting point for future growth.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total current invested assets, the starting point for future growth.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Toplam mevcut yatırım varlıkları, gelecekteki büyümenin başlangıç noktası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes aktuelles investiertes Vermögen, Ausgangspunkt für zukünftiges Wachstum

inputs.label: Monthly Savings
inputs.businessContext: Amount saved each month, assumed to be invested consistently.

businessContext_i18n.en: Amount saved each month, assumed to be invested consistently.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her ay biriktirilen miktar, tutarlı bir şekilde yatırıldığı varsayılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatlich gesparter Betrag, der konsequent investiert wird

inputs.label: Annual Expenses in Retirement
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual living expenses after reaching financial independence.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual living expenses after reaching financial independence.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Finansal bağımsızlığa ulaştıktan sonra beklenen yıllık yaşam giderleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Lebenshaltungskosten nach Erreichen der finanziellen Unabhängigkeit

inputs.label: Annual Return
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual investment return rate (e.g., 7% for a diversified portfolio).

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected annual investment return rate (e.g., 7% for a diversified portfolio).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Beklenen yıllık yatırım getirisi oranı (örneğin, çeşitlendirilmiş bir portföy için %7).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete jährliche Investitionsrendite (z. B. 7 % für ein diversifiziertes Portfolio)

inputs.label: Safe Withdrawal Rate
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of the portfolio withdrawn annually to cover expenses without depleting principal (commonly 4%).

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage of the portfolio withdrawn annually to cover expenses without depleting principal (commonly 4%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Anaparayı tüketmeden giderleri karşılamak için portföyden yıllık olarak çekilen yüzde (genellikle %4).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Portfolios, der jährlich entnommen wird, um Ausgaben zu decken, ohne das Kapital zu erschöpfen (üblich 4 %)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
